title: heterotheca villosa var. scabra
intro: Heterotheca villosa var. scabra, also known as rough leaved heterotheca, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Heterotheca villosa var. scabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
